title: Origins: The Botanist
description: Adding the botanist who is long gone from their profession, becoming the very thing they've cared for.
body:
## Description
Long gone from your profession, you've became the thing you've cared for.

## Powers
🟢 | Positive Power

🔵 | Ability

🟡 | Neutral Power

🔴 | Negative Power

——————————

🟢 **Green Thumb** - You have a natural fortune when harvesting crops.

🟢 **Own Kind** - Plants with thorns and items enchanted with thorns don't affect you.

🟢 **Quenching** - Your body gets hydrated in water. When wet, you will gain Regeneration I. You can also heal with bottles of water.

🟢 **Thorny Body** - You are armed with natural thorns as a defense mechanism.

🔵 **Private Garden (primary)** - Dimension Version - You have your own pocket dimension made for no organic creature but your beloved flowers (15s Cooldown).

🔵 **Burrow (primary)** - Non-Dimension Version - You can burrow under the ground's surface, and move at tremendous speeds (1m Cooldown).

🔵 **Earthquake (secondary)** - You can cause the ground around you to rumble, causing mobs to be stunned and slightly damaged (30s Cooldown).

——————————

🟡 **Green Skin** - Your skin has taken on a natural green hue from your work.

——————————

🔴 **Fire Vulnerability** - Your plant-y nature makes you more vulnerable to fire.

🔴 **Heavy Equipment** - Shields and armor are much too heavy to use. You are limited to leather armor.

🔴 **Thin Leaves** - Your body has lost mass and muscle. You have 3 less hearts and Weakness I.

🔴 **Vegetarian** - Your system evolved long past eating meat and cannot consume it.

## Want to Contact Me?
Join the Origins Discord server, head into the `#datapacks` channel, search for `The Botanist 🌱 [1.20.X]`, and leave a comment. I'll try my best to respond quickly, but remember, this is a hobby project and not every suggestion will be added!
